mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BLACKLIST WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
SELECT black_type FROM BLACKLIST WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND member_key = #{member_key}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BLACKLIST WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND member_key = #{member_key}
mapper.update: UPDATE BLACKLIST SET black_type = #{black_type}, reason = #{reason}, mod_date = SYSDATE, mod_id = #{mod_id} WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND black_idx = #{black_idx}
mapper.select:
SELECT (select homepage_name from cms_homepage a where a.homepage_id = blacklist.homepage_id) as homepage_name, homepage_id, black_idx, member_id, black_type, reason, delete_yn, add_date, add_id, mod_date, mod_id, member_name, member_key FROM BLACKLIST WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
